label: Architect: Execute
description: Run a previously generated plan one batch at a time, emit setup spec and task profiles, and register cron entries. Stages 4-5 of an architect run.

inputs.label: Plan artifact path
inputs.description: Path to plan.json produced by the Plan stage.

inputs.label: Execution mode
inputs.description: dry-run | apply-with-confirmation | apply-non-interactive. Defaults to apply-with-confirmation.

inputs.label: Start at step
inputs.description: Resume from operation index (0-based). Use to continue an interrupted run.

completion.notes: Summarize operations applied, irreversible operations confirmed, errors encountered, recovery state if any, and the setup spec path.

progress.notes: Report after each batch boundary. Verbosity required when running with non-interactive mode.

templates.dispatch: [System] Execute: You are Stage 4-5 of architect run {{input.run_id}}. Execute the plan at {{input.plan_artifact}} in mode {{input.execution_mode}} starting at step {{input.from_step}}. On success, write {{artifacts.primary.path}} and a summary. On failure, write recovery.md and stop.
templates.resume: [System] The daemon restarted. Resume architect execute task {{task.id}}. Run id: {{input.run_id}}. Re-check the last applied step in execute.log.json before proceeding.
templates.dispatchSummary: Execute stage started for architect run {{input.run_id}} (mode: {{input.execution_mode}}).
